mapper.select: select id, type, name, creator_type, creator_id from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from room_label where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
select id, type, name from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from apartment_label where is_deleted = 0 and apartment_id = #{id})

SELECT id, type, name, creator_type as creatorType, creator_id as creatorId, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM label_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (creator_type = 1 OR (creator_type = 2 AND creator_id = #{landlordId})) ORDER BY creator_type ASC, name ASC

SELECT li.id, li.type, li.name, li.creator_type as creatorType, li.creator_id as creatorId, li.create_time as createTime, li.update_time as updateTime FROM apartment_label al INNER JOIN label_info li ON al.label_id = li.id WHERE al.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} AND al.is_deleted = 0 AND li.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY li.name ASC
